_comment: Target `main` branch-protection policy for this repository. Apply with:
Requires Code Owner review + the listed status checks, and forbids
force-pushes and branch deletion. Root CODEOWNERS maps
`* @groganz @megajustice`, so the Code Owner requirement binds (there is no
`@cinatra-ai/maintainers` team yet; if one is created, repoint CODEOWNERS and
this note together). Review and adjust the required-check contexts if those
required_approving_review_count is 0 (NOT 1): the merge model is owner
--admin self-merge + the machine verification-record arm + a bot PR for any
high-risk change the owner approves (the owner cannot self-approve their own
PR, so a count of 1 would block routine owner merges). The org
stays true so the CODEOWNERS gate still binds. The `proof` context is the
NOTE: a `v*` tag triggers a production deploy (build-image.yml -> ops), so
tag/release creation must be restricted to maintainers SEPARATELY (Settings ->
Tags, or a `v*` tag protection rule) — branch protection does not cover tags.
